query:
-- May 26 blocks (plan id 1110003 already exists)
INSERT INTO scheduleBlocks (planId, sortOrder, title, blockType, subjectId, durationMin, description) VALUES
(1110003, 0, 'Slow morning',                 'morning_warmup', NULL, 20, 'Tea, hello, parakeets, ducks. Summer pace.'),
(1110003, 1, 'Math — Spectrum Math Gr 5',    'math',           (SELECT id FROM subjects WHERE slug='math'), 20, 'One short page. Light. Not the focus today.'),
(1110003, 2, 'Outdoor / nature',             'adventure',      (SELECT id FROM subjects WHERE slug='science'), 35, 'Walk the yard, run check on the surviving 3 ducks, notice what is growing.'),
(1110003, 3, 'Reading — your pick',          'read_aloud',     (SELECT id FROM subjects WHERE slug='ela'), 25, 'Tuck Everlasting OR Michael''s World OR something off the bookshelf. Your call.'),
(1110003, 4, 'Choice block',                 'choice',         NULL, 30, 'Whatever you want. Art, makeup, parakeets, drawing, music.'),
(1110003, 5, 'Cozy wrap-up',                 'catch_up',       NULL, 10, 'What stuck with you today? Or just done.');

-- May 28 plan
INSERT INTO dailyPlans (date, dayType, status, notes)
VALUES ('2026-05-28', 'full', 'planned', 'Second summer-mode day. Slightly more structure than Tue. Includes placement page intro.');
SET @p28 := LAST_INSERT_ID();

INSERT INTO scheduleBlocks (planId, sortOrder, title, blockType, subjectId, durationMin, description) VALUES
(@p28, 0, 'Slow morning',                          'morning_warmup', NULL, 20, 'Slow start. Summer pace.'),
(@p28, 1, 'Try one thing on the placement page',   'custom',         (SELECT id FROM subjects WHERE slug='ela'), 20, 'Try a few questions. Skip is a real button. We are just seeing what feels easy and what feels hard.'),
(@p28, 2, 'Duck care + nature',                    'adventure',      (SELECT id FROM subjects WHERE slug='science'), 35, 'Sit with the ducks, water, run check, notice the yard.'),
(@p28, 3, 'Spectrum Science Gr 5',                 'adventure',      (SELECT id FROM subjects WHERE slug='science'), 25, 'One short lesson plus the matching reading.'),
(@p28, 4, 'Choice block',                          'choice',         NULL, 30, 'Whatever you want.'),
(@p28, 5, '180 Days of Language Gr 5',             'custom',         (SELECT id FROM subjects WHERE slug='ela'), 15, 'One page. That is it.'),
(@p28, 6, 'Cozy wrap-up',                          'catch_up',       NULL, 10, 'Optional. Or just done.');

-- Verify both
SELECT dp.id, dp.date, dp.dayType, dp.status, COUNT(sb.id) AS blocks, SUM(sb.durationMin) AS total_min
FROM dailyPlans dp
LEFT JOIN scheduleBlocks sb ON sb.planId = dp.id
WHERE dp.date IN ('2026-05-26','2026-05-28')
GROUP BY dp.id
ORDER BY dp.date;
